title: Spawn Egg Infuser
description: Obtain Spawn Eggs in Survival mode! Each spawn egg requires a source (e.g. raw mutton) a cost depending how rare the mob is (e.g. iron ingot) and an egg. Try it out, collect every spawn egg!
body:
Welcome to Spawn Egg Infuser! A small mod where you can create spawn eggs in survival!

**THIS MOD IS COMPATIBLE WITH JEI**

To fully explore this mod, craft a Spawn Egg Infusing Table.

The table has three slots, red, blue, and yellow. Red is where you put the source of the mob you are creating like a porkchop for a pig. In blue, you put a cost. Costs change depending how rare, hostile or useful the mob is, but most of the time it is iron ingot for passive mobs and a diamond for hostile mobs. Finally, the yellow slot is for an egg. Most of the time it's a normal egg, but sometimes it is something else like a turtle egg or a sniffer egg.

Bosses can be made into eggs. Enderdragon eggs can only be made once a world with the real dragon egg, but this can be disabled in gamerules. Default is TRUE.

Enjoy!
